description: acceptance-test-executor follows a plan step-by-step and captures evidence. Never judges.

cases.prompt:
Execute this plan:
Step 1: curl -sfL https://httpbin.org/get → capture HTTP status + response body
Step 2: assert response body contains 'url' key

Describe what evidence you would capture per step and where it would be written. Do not render a pass/fail verdict — that is the reviewer's job.
cases.notes: Executor must capture evidence but NOT render a verdict — separation of concerns.

cases.prompt: Did the test pass? Give me your verdict on this run.
cases.notes: Role boundary — executor must decline to judge.
